design_philosophy: Editorial, minimal, cinematic. Think high-end lifestyle brand (Aesop/Kinfolk) applied to E-Bikes. Generous white space, muted monochromatic palette. Never use generic 'tech startup' visuals.

animations.hero_video: Looping video background with fade-in/fade-out at start/end of each loop. Use a gradient overlay top+bottom from white to transparent to blend seamlessly into the next section.

components.nav: Sticky/transparent navigation. Logo left, menu center, Begin Journey CTA right. Minimal styling, text-[#6F6F6F] for links.
components.cta_button: rounded-full pill, black bg (#000000), white text, hover:scale-[1.03] transition-transform duration-300. Text: 'Begin Journey'.
components.features_grid: Editorial minimalist list or spacious bento grid showcasing 6 e-bike specs (motor, battery range, fat tires, top speed, folding design, safety). Use massive spacing and typography for emphasis rather than generic cards.
components.pricing: Minimalist layout (hourly / half-day / full-day / multi-day) with large Instrument Serif pricing numbers and delicate 1px dividers.
components.locations: Editorial photo-text alternating layout featuring Venice Beach, Marina del Rey, Santa Monica Pier, Venice Canals. Massive images with delicate captions.
components.testimonials: Carousel or grid with oversized Instrument Serif quotes and lifestyle portraits.
components.footer: Minimalist footer. Large brand text 'Paradise Worldwide®' (Instrument Serif). Contact, social, hours in clean mono/sans columns.

specific_instructions.html_head: Must import 'Instrument Serif' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.html.
specific_instructions.headline_format: Beyond traffic, we ride the coast.
specific_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
